text.content:
Real-time Analytics Dashboard
Provides live data visualization with customizable widgets and automated alerting for key metrics

Advanced ML Pipeline
End-to-end machine learning workflow with automated feature engineering and model deployment

Multi-tenant Architecture
Isolated data partitioning with configurable resource allocation and tenant-level billing

Enterprise SSO Integration
SAML 2.0 and OIDC support with directory sync and just-in-time provisioning

GraphQL API Gateway
Federated schema stitching with query optimization, rate limiting, and developer sandbox

Compliance Automation
Automated SOC 2 evidence collection with continuous control monitoring and audit trails

Data Residency Controls
Configurable geographic data boundaries with encryption at rest and in-transit by region

Workflow Orchestration
Visual workflow builder with conditional logic, parallel execution, and error handling

Custom Report Builder
Drag-and-drop report designer with scheduled generation and multi-format export options

Edge Computing Support
Distributed processing nodes with local caching, offline mode, and eventual consistency

AI-Powered Search
Semantic search with natural language queries, faceted filtering, and relevance tuning

Automated Scaling Engine
Predictive autoscaling based on historical patterns with cost optimization recommendations
